craigslist.title: Window Coverings, Online Payments Available, On-Site Management
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 111 Summit Terrace, South Portland, ME 04106 Portland Maine apartments dont get better, more convenient, and more tailored to your needs and wishes for a dream home than the ones at Summit Terrace Apartments. All the features of our apartments are carefully thought out to create a home you can transition easily into and be proud of, all year long. We make choosing a floor plan easy and efficient: our two-bedroom floor plans come with or without a washer so you can decide simply what you want to invest in. Whatever you choose, our spacious apartments and the amenities that come with them give you a fresh perspective of the area: enjoy the views of South Portland from patios and terraces, relax at home catching up on your shows with cable and satellite, or rest easy knowing your rent includes utilities such as heat, water, sewer, parking, snow removal and lawn care, unlike many of the other communities in the area that leave these costs to you. Take care of your laundry in your apartment or at our on-site laundry facilities. Get your needs taken care of with on-site management, on-site maintenance, and 24-hour emergency maintenance. Dont leave your furry friend behind, our community is pet friendly. From Summit Terrace you can feel happy and comfortable, whether you prefer to stay in and relax or you want to venture out into Downtown Portland for work or for an exciting night out at the areas best shopping, dining, and entertainment options. Our location offers easy access whether youre walking or driving to Old Port, Southern Maine Community College, Bug Light Park, and Willard Beach, so you can have fun or take care of business without the stress of a long commute. See what it could be like to make Summit Terrace your new home by viewing our photo gallery and contacting us to set up an in-person tour! Features Include: Dishwasher Laundry Facilities Large Walk in Closet Microwaves Bike Racks Free Off-Street Parking Window Coverings On-Site Management Refrigerator Vinyl Plank Flooring Online Payments Available Controlled Access/Gated Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://livebriarcliffmgmt.com/uqxp7wvq/summit-terrace We are currently offering 12-month lease terms at this time. *Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. Photos may not be of the exact advertised unit. Contact us today for the most up to date information.
